executiveSummary: MH Construction supported a commercial tenant improvement at the Volm Companies regional distribution and manufacturing facility in Pasco, WA. The project addressed exterior presentation and operational frontage at an active industrial site with controlled sequencing around personnel, customer access, and logistics traffic.
clientBackground: Volm Companies provides equipment, packaging, and design solutions for fresh produce, frozen food, and agricultural industries. The Pasco facility serves as a key regional distribution and manufacturing hub supporting Pacific Northwest operations.
challenge: Execute facade modifications and site improvements at an operating distribution center without disrupting daily manufacturing and logistics workflows.
scopeOfWork: Exterior facade updates and commercial tenant improvements
Site work coordination including right-of-way and sidewalk improvements
Main entrance and storefront glazing integration
Corporate signage coordination and exterior finishing

timelineAndMilestones.name: Permit Issuance
timelineAndMilestones.note: City of Pasco issued right-of-way permit ROW19-0275 for curb, gutter, and sidewalk improvements associated with the tenant improvement.

timelineAndMilestones.name: Permit Finaled
timelineAndMilestones.note: Right-of-way permit ROW19-0275 passed final inspection.

timelineAndMilestones.name: Final Photography
timelineAndMilestones.note: Exterior facade and completed entrance documented by MH Construction.

executionDetails: MH Construction managed exterior remodel and site improvements at 5702 Industrial Way using controlled sequencing and Procore-based project administration to protect ongoing operations.
outcomesAndImpact: Modernized the Volm Pasco facility exterior to align with corporate presentation standards
Delivered updated entrance, wall panels, storefront glazing, and frontage condition
Completed right-of-way and tenant-improvement scopes with city permit closeout
Supported long-term operational continuity at an active regional distribution site

clientTestimonial.quote: This is a pretty impressive building and they have done a quality job the whole way through.
clientTestimonial.name: Daniel Mueller
clientTestimonial.title: President and CEO

safetyAndComplianceNotes.projectSpecificSafetyProtocols: Active-industrial-environment safety controls were used during site and frontage work.
